scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run build -w @gamepulse/web
scripts.sync:android: npm run build:web && cap sync android
scripts.android:assemble: npm run sync:android && node scripts/build-android.mjs assembleDebug
scripts.android:bundle: npm run sync:android && node scripts/build-android.mjs bundleRelease
